title: TNT Expanded
description: Adds a TNT Sword, TNT Armor and more ! 💥
body:
![https://i.imgur.com/CShpNyB.png](https://i.imgur.com/CShpNyB.png)
**We all know TNT is probably the most iconic block in the whole of Minecraft.**

**This mod maximizes this fun by adding more TNT related stuff!**

**TNT Expanded 1.0.0:**
- Added TNT Sword
  _Explodes when entity is hit or when right clicked on a block._
- Added TNT armor (full set)
  _This armor makes you immune to explosions._
- Added Liquid TNT
  _Yes, TNT in a bucket, we never knew we needed it but we do._

![https://i.imgur.com/NuzPhbv.png](https://i.imgur.com/NuzPhbv.png)
